# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

@AGENTS.md

## Commands

```bash
npm run dev      # Start development server on http://localhost:3000
npm run build    # Production build
npm run lint     # Run ESLint
```

## Stack

- **Next.js 16.2.2** with App Router (`src/app/`)
- **React 19.2.4**
- **Tailwind CSS v4** (configured via `@tailwindcss/postcss`)
- **TypeScript**

## Documentation Standards

**IMPORTANT:** All code generated by Claude Code must **ALWAYS** first refer to the relevant docs files within the `/docs` directory. These docs define project-wide standards and requirements that must be followed.

Before generating any code:
1. Check if a relevant doc exists in `/docs` for the feature/component type
2. Read and understand the standards defined in that doc
3. Ensure all generated code adheres to those standards

Current documentation:
- `/docs/ui.md` — UI component standards and date formatting requirements
- `/docs/data-fetching.md` — Data fetching requirements, Drizzle ORM usage, and critical user data isolation rules

## Architecture

This is a Next.js App Router project. All routes and layouts live under `src/app/`. The entry point is `src/app/page.tsx` with `src/app/layout.tsx` as the root layout.

Next.js 16 may have breaking changes from earlier versions — check `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` before writing any Next.js-specific code.
